response.justification: The candidate exceeds the 15-year experience requirement and currently works on AI infrastructure, but lacks demonstrated expertise in building AI products or platforms—the core differentiation the role requires. While recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflows is promising, there is no evidence of recognized AI product success or the strategic advisory track record expected for a director-level principal engineer in AI strategy.
strengths: 18+ years of engineering experience significantly exceeds the minimum requirement
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, showing active engagement with AI systems
Proven entrepreneurial and thought leadership through GISCollective, open-source projects, and teaching workshops
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI; background is general computer science without specialized AI training
Current AI work is infrastructure and tooling focused, not demonstrated product or platform building with AI
Staff-level position but role requires director-level individual contributor with proven strategic influence

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI product expertise
